subcodes.first_line: O God, this is a servant, the son of a servant of thine. This boy has moved in the love of Thy grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک و ابن عبدک الذی حرک الی لجه ابحر عنایتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation
